message:
test(fcp-conformance): OAuth2 auth-code + PKCE conformance mirror (br-axxrd)

fcp-oauth previously had zero conformance coverage in
crates/fcp-conformance/tests/. It implements RFC 6749 OAuth 2.0 and
RFC 7636 PKCE — both specs have enumerable MUST clauses that belong
in a dedicated conformance suite separate from the crate's own unit
tests.

Added two test binaries, one per RFC, with each test tagged by its
clause number in the function name.

## crates/fcp-conformance/tests/pkce_conformance.rs (RFC 7636)

12 tests:
  §4.1 verifier length matrix (42 reject, 43 accept, 128 accept, 129 reject)
  §4.1 verifier charset (all unreserved chars accepted; reserved and
       non-ASCII rejected with PkceError)
  §4.2 plain method: challenge == verifier
  §4.2 S256 method: base64url-no-pad, deterministic, challenge ≠ verifier
  Appendix B known-answer vector:
    verifier  = dBjftJeZ4CVP-mB92K27uhbUJU1p1r_wW1gFWFOEjXk
    challenge = E9Melhoa2OwvFrEMTJguCHaoeK1t8URWbuGJSstw-cM

## crates/fcp-conformance/tests/oauth2_auth_code_flow_conformance.rs
## (RFC 6749 §4.1 + RFC 7636 §4.3)

11 tests:
  §4.1.1 authorization URL required params (response_type=code,
         client_id, redirect_uri, state)
  §4.3 PKCE variant carries code_challenge + code_challenge_method
  §4.1.2 success callback echoes code + state
  §4.1.2.1 error callback surfaces AuthorizationError{error, description}
  §10.12 state mismatch rejected as StateMismatch (CSRF defense)
  §10.12 empty expected_state rejected (defense-in-depth)
  §4.1.4 minimal token response (access_token + token_type) accepted
  §4.1.4 empty access_token rejected with EmptyTokenField
  §4.1.4 empty token_type rejected with EmptyTokenField
  §4.1.4 full token response preserves all optional fields
  §3.3  scope parses as space-separated list (also handles \t + multi-SP)

## Wiring

  crates/fcp-conformance/Cargo.toml:
    [dev-dependencies]
    + fcp-oauth = { path = "../fcp-oauth" }
    + url.workspace = true

## Verified

  CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/fcp-swarm-p2 cargo test --offline \
    -p fcp-conformance --test pkce_conformance
  -> 12 passed; 0 failed
  CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/fcp-swarm-p2 cargo test --offline \
    -p fcp-conformance --test oauth2_auth_code_flow_conformance
  -> 11 passed; 0 failed

Closes flywheel_connectors-axxrd.

Cross-reference: fuzz_oauth_token_response / fuzz_oauth_callback_url /
fuzz_pkce_verifier (commit 6d382852) find crashes; this suite finds
spec divergences.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
